content.p: The use, when permitted, or operation of any sound device shall be subject to the following regulations:
The only sounds permitted are music or human speech.
No such sound device shall be permitted within one hundred (100) yards of any hospital or public library.
The human speech and music issued shall not be profane, lewd, indecent or slanderous.

The volume of sound shall be controlled so that it will not be audible for a distance in excess of one hundred fifty (150) feet from the sound device and so that the volume is not unreasonably loud, raucous, jarring, disturbing or a nuisance to persons within the area of audibility.
